name: RuleTester discovers .ts case files under valid/ and invalid/ per the §16 architecture file extension contract
command:
mkdir -p tests/r/valid && printf 'ok
' > tests/r/valid/case1.ts && printf 'ok
' > tests/r/valid/case2.ts && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
exit 0
' > stub.sh && chmod +x stub.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/test-rule.sh" r --tests-dir tests --detector stub.sh 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pass=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
